_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 22 canonical supplement product types. Single source of truth shared between pipeline (supplement_taxonomy.py) and Flutter app (product_type_vocab.dart). Drives primary_category column, search filter chips, and product badges.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/supplement_taxonomy.py PRIMARY_TYPES list. Flutter consumer: assets/data/product_type_vocab.json loaded by VocabRegistry.

product_types.name: Single Vitamin
product_types.notes: Products with one quantified vitamin as the primary active ingredient.

product_types.name: Single Mineral
product_types.notes: Products with one quantified mineral as the primary active ingredient.

product_types.name: Vitamin Complex
product_types.notes: Products with two or more distinct quantified vitamin identities that do not qualify as B-complex or multivitamin.

product_types.name: Mineral Complex
product_types.notes: Products with two or more distinct quantified mineral identities that do not qualify as electrolyte products.

product_types.name: Vitamin & Mineral Combo
product_types.notes: Products combining 2-5 vitamins and/or minerals without qualifying as a full multivitamin.

product_types.name: Multivitamin
product_types.notes: Broad-spectrum products with 6+ quantified vitamins and minerals across multiple categories.

product_types.name: B-Complex
product_types.notes: Products primarily composed of B-vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B7, B9, B12).

product_types.name: Omega-3 & Fish Oil
product_types.notes: Fish oil, krill oil, algal oil, and other EPA/DHA-containing products.

product_types.name: Probiotic
product_types.notes: Products containing live microbial strains with documented CFU counts.

product_types.name: Herbal & Botanical
product_types.notes: Single-herb or herbal blend products — adaptogens, nervines, botanicals.

product_types.name: Protein Powder
product_types.notes: Whey, casein, plant-based, and other protein supplements in powder form.

product_types.name: Collagen
product_types.notes: Collagen peptides, hydrolyzed collagen, and type-specific collagen supplements.

product_types.name: Greens Powder
product_types.notes: Superfood and greens powder blends (spirulina, chlorella, wheatgrass, etc.).

product_types.name: Electrolyte
product_types.notes: Electrolyte and hydration products with sodium, potassium, magnesium.

product_types.name: Pre-Workout
product_types.notes: Pre-workout formulas with caffeine, beta-alanine, citrulline, creatine.

product_types.name: Amino Acid
product_types.notes: Free-form amino acid supplements — BCAAs, glutamine, creatine, NAC.

product_types.name: Fiber & Digestive
product_types.notes: Fiber supplements, prebiotics, and digestive enzymes.

product_types.name: Sleep Support
product_types.notes: Products formulated for sleep — melatonin, magnesium, L-theanine, valerian.

product_types.name: Immune Support
product_types.notes: Products targeting immune function — elderberry, echinacea, vitamin C blends.

product_types.name: Joint Support
product_types.notes: Products for joint health — glucosamine, chondroitin, MSM, collagen type II.

product_types.name: Hair, Skin & Nails
product_types.notes: Beauty-focused supplements — biotin, collagen, keratin, silica formulas.

product_types.name: General Supplement
product_types.notes: Products that don't fit a specific category — mixed formulations or uncommon ingredients.
